issues_found: Source is a listing_page/index, not an archiveable source document per Rule 5
URL field is blank - no specific source document can be accessed or verified
Source contains only a table of contents/navigation links with no substantive content
Content is from 2008 (approximately 17 years stale) with no single publication date
JavaScript dependency prevents direct content access
Mixed content types (monetary policy, enforcement, banking applications) without unified focus

corrected_fields.summary: This is a listing page (index) of Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2008. It contains no substantive source content; only a chronological table of contents linking to individual press releases spanning monetary policy announcements, enforcement actions, banking applications, and regulatory updates. The page requires JavaScript to navigate to actual content.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source provides no actionable content for the finance research archive. It is a navigational index that cannot be archived in its current form. Researchers seeking 2008 Federal Reserve communications would need to access individual press release URLs directly.
